full_suite.failure_notes: Literal pytest EXIT 1. Eight environment failures are managed-sandbox socket bind denials: three test_court_keypoint_review_server nodes, three test_review_input_server nodes, and two test_sam3dbody_persistent_worker nodes; the manager's unsandboxed 57-node rerun passed. Four test_ball_physics_fill nodes are caused by concurrent tbwire commit bd99c6d11: fill_ball_track_physics eagerly evaluates time_for_frame with an empty frame-time mapping, and tbwire changed that case from historical CFR fallback to ValueError; all four pass (literal EXIT 0) when the pre-tbwire fallback is restored in-memory. coordwire does not own or edit io_decode/timebase/ball_physics_fill, and no owned coordinate test failed. The earlier full_pytest.log attempt was externally killed at 93% and is interruption evidence only, not counted.

honest_issues: VERIFIED=0 remains binding. This is typed wiring and numerical parity evidence only, not a capability promotion or an accuracy improvement claim.

The NS-01.4 independent-label clause is PENDING: no independent coordinate-error label set exists until NS-02 owner-gated capture/labels, so corrected event/geometry error beating the raw path is unmeasured.
The mandatory wide suite is not green; objective_result is PARTIAL even though every owned focused/parity test passed.

Four wide failures expose a concurrent tbwire regression at an eager empty-frame-times call in ball_physics_fill. The manager instructed this lane not to touch concurrent timebase files, so it is attributed and left for that owner.
Eight wide failures are socket-bind PermissionError failures imposed by the managed sandbox, not coordinate-path failures.

The frozen Wolverine calibration has zero distortion and supplies real-iPhone byte parity; separate synthetic cameras with nonzero distortion coefficients supply the required distortion plumbing/parity coverage.

The manager's cited residual _project_world_point near ball_physics3d line 805 is absent at current HEAD (the module is shorter); the current live residual seam is _project_world_array and is adopted/tested.
Protected Outdoor/Indoor labels were never read. The SHA-pinned Wolverine fixture was read-only.
DEFERRED process_video.py hunks: none. No runner hunk is required for these module-internal live consumer routes, and no process_video.py change was applied by coordwire.
BEST-STACK DELTA: (c) no stack delta; best_stack.json is unchanged.
